channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Stefan Falke Uses Handheld Mirrors to Reimagine New York Street Photography
item.description: LensCulture highlights the work of photographer Stefan Falke, whose project 'Reflecting New York' presents a distinctive approach to street photography. By using a handheld mirror in various locations...

item.title: Russian Survey Ship Akademik Alexander Karpinsky Shows Signs of AIS Spoofing Amid Antarctic Prospecting Allegations
item.description: A Russian seismic survey vessel, the Akademik Alexander Karpinsky, owned by state-owned Rosgeo, has been at the center of a multi-year investigation by Daily Maverick regarding potential violations of...

item.title: Trump Criticizes Sen. Thom Tillis After Conditions Placed on Todd Blanche Confirmation
item.description: President Donald Trump sharply criticized Senator Thom Tillis of North Carolina after the Republican senator indicated that he would not support the confirmation of Todd Blanche as attorney general un...

item.title: Nicola Walker and Jemaine Clement discuss Alice and Steve, a comedy-drama exploring friendship, betrayal and family conflict
item.description: The article examines the new Disney+ series Alice and Steve, starring Nicola Walker and Jemaine Clement and created by Sophie Goodhart. The programme centres on the long-standing friendship between Al...

item.title: Texas Governor Declares Statewide Disaster Due to New World Screwworm Detection in Livestock
item.description: Texas Governor Greg Abbott has declared a state of disaster across all 254 counties in response to the detection of the New World Screwworm, a parasitic fly whose larvae feed on the living tissue of w...

item.title: Sen. Ron Johnson Questions Ebola Vaccine Preparedness During Interview on Public Health Risks
item.description: A news report focuses on comments made by U.S. Senator Ron Johnson of Wisconsin during an interview on LindellTV, where he expressed skepticism about the need for Ebola vaccines and criticized what he...

item.title: Nearly 60 Idaho Residents Sickened by Raw Milk in Recent Outbreak
item.description: Idaho health officials are investigating an outbreak of illnesses linked to raw milk consumption that has affected nearly 60 people across the state in the past two weeks. The cases began appearing ar...

item.title: Microsoft Expands AI Development Platform and Reveals Majorana 2 Quantum Chip at Build 2026
item.description: At its Build 2026 developer conference, Microsoft announced a broad range of new artificial intelligence, software development, and quantum computing initiatives aimed at simplifying the creation and ...

item.title: Republican Congressman Randy Fine Criticized for Claiming Misaddressed Mail Ballot Indicates Election Fraud
item.description: Rep. Randy Fine (R-FL), a recently elected Republican lawmaker, sparked backlash on social media after receiving a mail ballot addressed to a previous resident of his Washington, D.C. apartment. Fine ...

item.title: Trump Arrives Late to Wisconsin Economic Event as Questions Grow Over Bill Pulte Intelligence Appointment
item.description: President Donald Trump traveled to Eau Claire, Wisconsin, on June 5, 2026, for an event focused on his economic agenda and issues affecting farmers and the agricultural sector. According to CNN chief ...

item.title: Vehicle Slowly Pushes Through Protesters Blocking Exit at Newark ICE Detention Facility
item.description: A confrontation outside the Delaney Hall immigration detention center in Newark, New Jersey, intensified on June 5, 2026, when a red sedan moved slowly into a group of protesters who were blocking an ...

item.title: Xiaomi 18 Pro rumored to feature larger 4-inch rear display with higher brightness and resolution
item.description: The Xiaomi 18 Pro is reportedly set to introduce a significantly upgraded rear display, continuing the company’s experimentation with secondary screens on its flagship smartphones. According to recent...

item.title: MSNBC Hosts Question Trump's Health After Apparent Drowsiness During Oval Office Event

item.title: Health officials prepare for infectious disease risks as expanded 2026 World Cup begins
item.description: As the 2026 FIFA World Cup begins across the United States, Canada, and Mexico, public health officials are preparing for a wide range of infectious disease risks associated with the largest tournamen...

item.title: Brexit’s legacy of misinformation, political polarisation and economic damage in Britain
item.description: In this opinion piece, Jonathan Freedland reflects on the tenth anniversary of the 2016 Brexit referendum and argues that Britain is now living with the deep political, economic and cultural consequen...

item.title: Andrew Malkinson criticises 24-year sentence given to man convicted of 2003 rape case
item.description: Andrew Malkinson, who was wrongly imprisoned for 17 years in one of the most serious miscarriages of justice in the UK, has described the 24-year sentence handed to the man convicted of the 2003 rape ...

item.title: Four House Democrats Join Republicans in Supporting Spending Bill That Reduces WIC Funding
item.description: A narrowly approved House spending bill has sparked criticism after four Democratic representatives voted alongside Republicans to pass legislation that includes significant reductions to federal nutr...

item.title: FBI Director Kash Patel Fires Five Intelligence Analysts Over Controversial 2023 Richmond Memo

item.title: Judge upholds 60-day jail contempt sentence in Matt Bevin child support document dispute
item.description: Former Kentucky Governor Matt Bevin is facing continued legal trouble after a judge refused to grant him relief from a 60-day jail sentence imposed for civil contempt of court in an ongoing child supp...
